title: Unidentified Imperial officer (Battle of Sullust)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Character |type=Galactic Empire |image=[[File:SullustImperialOfficer-RenegadeSquadron.png]] |name=Unidentified Imperial officer
(Battle of Sullust) |homeworld= |birth= |death=[[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair=[[Black]] |feathers= |eyes=Black |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] |masters= |apprentices= }} An '''individual''' was an [[Imperial officer/Legends|Imperial officer]] in the [[Imperial Army/Legends|Imperial Army]] that was in command of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] on [[Sullust/Legends|Sullust]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], during the [[Battle of Sullust (4 ABY)|Battle of Sullust]], he commanded the Imperial troops during the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] attack. When [[Renegade Squadron/Legends|Renegade Squadron]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance's]] elite fighting force, discovered that their plan to lure away some of the Imperial fleet from [[Endor/Legends|Endor]], while [[General/Legends|General]] [[Han Solo/Legends|Solo's]] strike force could land, had not work, they attempted to make it off Sullust. The officer quickly ordered his [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] ally, [[IG-88B|IG-88]], to keep the rebel preoccupied while he set [[Gravity well projector/Legends|gravity well projectors]] to keep the rebels trapped on Sullust. When Renegade Squadron defeated IG-88, the commander activated [[Deflector shield/Legends|shields]] to protect the [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity wells]]. Renegade Squadron's [[Commander/Legends|commander]], [[Col Serra]], ordered his men to get the codes to the shields so they could disable the projectors, which the officer was holding. Renegade Squadron killed the officer and the [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] protecting him and took the codes, shut down shields, and destroyed the gravity well projectors. This allowed Renegade Squadron to take control of Sullust and make it to Endor in time. ==Appearances== *''[[Star Wars Battlefront: Renegade Squadron]]'' {{1st}} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Imperial Army officers of the Galactic Empire]] [[Category:Males]]
